jd_summary: People Operations Coordinator at Cursor (Anysphere), in-person in San Francisco. Owns the new hire experience end-to-end (HRIS entry, welcome comms, day-one orientation), maintains accurate employee data in Rippling across the full lifecycle, generates VOE/standard HR docs, responds to people inquiries in Slack, and supports broader People team projects/process improvements. People-experience focused with HR data-integrity responsibilities.
yoe_required: 1-3 years in HR coordination, People Ops, or a similar administrative/operational role
sponsorship_note: No sponsorship statement either way in the JD or Ashby posting (not an explicit no-sponsor hard stop). Jamie requires H-1B transfer-only sponsorship; unconfirmed for Cursor/Anysphere. Cursor is a small, flat startup.
